member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.ClientConfig
member.summary: Configuration for . Build with via .

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.ClientConfig.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Start building a config for the given API key.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext
member.summary: Returned by . Provides all operations on an active collection.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.StatusAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the current collection status.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.WaitForAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Poll status until terminal or challenge required, or until elapses.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.InviteAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send an invite to the consumer.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.ResolveAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolve a challenge.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.GetChallengeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get a challenge by ID.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.GetProductsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List available data products for the collection.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.GetDataAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download a data product.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.GetAllProductsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download every available data product for this collection as a ZIP archive (raw bytes).

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.GetProductsSummaryAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download the typed summary of all data products for this collection.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.ViewAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all collections (pass null collectionId for paginated list).

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.ViewCollectionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: View a specific collection by ID.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.CollectionContext.DeleteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Delete the collection.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.ConnectContext
member.summary: Returned by . Use to begin a collection.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.ConnectContext.StartAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start a collection.
member.param: Service IDs to request for the collection.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.ConnectContext.UploadAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a collection by extracting data from ePDF bank statements.
member.param: Paths to the PDF files to upload.
Force re-extraction of the uploaded documents.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.ProductsSummary
member.summary: Typed response of GET /delivery-api/collections/{collectionId}/products/summary. Properties may be null because the API omits null / empty values.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryStatement
member.summary: The statement block of a .

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryStatement.Summaries
member.summary: Count of monthly summary rows.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryCustomer
member.summary: Customer block of a .

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryCustomer.Match
member.summary: Levenshtein distance between name and format; -1 when unavailable.

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryCustomer.Type
member.summary: Origin of the data: online, statement or unknown.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryCheck
member.summary: A single check (fraud / personal-info / etc.) in a .

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryAccount
member.summary: An account block of a .

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryAccount.Id
member.summary: SHA-256 hash of accountNumber:accountName.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryTransaction
member.summary: A categorised transaction in a .

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryTransaction.Type
member.summary: Transaction direction: credit or debit.

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryTransaction.Date
member.summary: ISO-like timestamp, e.g. 2024-01-15T00:00:00.000000Z.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryMonth
member.summary: A monthly aggregate row of a . Monetary values are decimal strings.

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.SummaryMonth.Month
member.summary: Month name, e.g. JANUARY.

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.Status.IsTerminal
member.summary: Terminal when collection reached success, failure, or other final state (code >= 2000).

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.Models.Status.RequiresChallenge
member.summary: Requires challenge response for known bank authentication prompts.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Platform.ConfigManager
member.summary: Reads environment variables, .env, and .truid.properties to resolve SDK configuration. Priority: TRUID_* env vars → legacy names → .env file → defaults.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Platform.ExtracterServiceV40
member.summary:
Platform implementation for the truID Extracter API v4.0 (extracter-api).
Upload feature: POST /uploads — create a collection by extracting data from one or more ePDF bank statements (multipart/form-data). The API responds with 201 and a Location header carrying the new collection ID.

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.Platform.HttpClientWrapper
member.summary: Shared HTTP client with retry on 5xx responses and connection-pool reuse. One instance is created per TruIDClient and shared across all services.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.Platform.HttpClientWrapper.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpMessageHandler,System.Int32)
member.summary: Test-only constructor: inject a custom .

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.Platform.HttpClientWrapper.PostMultipartAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Net.Http.MultipartFormDataContent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: POST a body (for multipart/form-data uploads). The content sets its own Content-Type header (including the boundary).

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.Platform.ProductsServiceV40.GetAllProductsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Download every available data product for a collection in one call. GET /delivery-api/collections/{collectionId}/products/all
The endpoint returns a ZIP archive (application/zip) containing one file per data product, so the raw archive bytes are returned.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.Platform.ProductsServiceV40.GetProductsSummaryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download the typed summary of all data products for a collection. GET /delivery-api/collections/{collectionId}/products/summary

member.name: T:TruID.Connect.SDK.TruIDClient
member.summary: Entry point for the truID Connect SDK. Create one instance per application; it is thread-safe and reusable. Dispose when done to release the underlying HTTP connection pool.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.TruIDClient.#ctor(TruID.Connect.SDK.ClientConfig)
member.summary: Create a client using a .

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.TruIDClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a client with explicit parameters.

member.name: P:TruID.Connect.SDK.TruIDClient.IsFree
member.summary: True after has been called.

member.name: M:TruID.Connect.SDK.TruIDClient.ConnectAsync(System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch or refresh the connect manifest (available companies, brands, providers).
member.param: When true, clears the in-memory cache before fetching.
